message:
feat(engine): add frx_lockstep_oracle and counterfactual_evaluator modules

Two new engine modules:

1. frx_lockstep_oracle.rs: Implements a lockstep execution oracle
   for the FRX (Framework Reconciliation eXecutable) subsystem. The
   oracle maintains synchronized state across multiple engine
   instances, detecting divergence in real-time and providing
   authoritative conflict resolution. Includes binary entry point
   in src/bin/frx_lockstep_oracle.rs for standalone operation.

2. counterfactual_evaluator.rs: Evaluates counterfactual queries
   against the structural causal model. Given an observed outcome
   and a hypothetical intervention, computes what would have
   happened under the alternative scenario. Used by the gate system
   to assess whether a failing gate would have passed under
   different configurations.

Registers both modules in lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
